title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・未踏の栄光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the clear autumn sky, a great cheer
resounds from the crowd in celebration of Mejiro
McQueen's victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An indescribable joy wells in her heart as she
receives praise and congratulations from me, the
spectators, and members of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been through some difficult times—times
when she even doubted herself. But she persisted
and continued running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, she becomes the first of her family to
conquer both the spring and autumn races of the
Tenno Sho.
